personal.name: Naved Siddiqui
personal.title: Product Lead | Senior Business Analyst

stats.label: Projects
details: Faecal Sludge Management System - Odisha Government

personal.bio:
As a Senior Business Analyst and Product Lead with over a decade of experience, I specialize in delivering high-impact solutions across Supply Chain Management, E-Commerce, and Government Services.

I am deeply passionate about modernizing legacy processes through AI-enhanced features. My focus is on guiding cross-functional teams through the complete SDLC to ensure products are not only functional but intelligent and data-driven—a methodology I recently applied to successfully launch an Inhouse OMS and Inventory planning platform integrated with predictive behavioral algorithms and compliant data architectures.

expertise.title: Supply Chain (SCM)
expertise.desc: Modernising global warehousing, complex multi-region logistics, and order management systems.

expertise.title: E-Commerce
expertise.desc: Building hyper-local marketplaces, cross-border integrations, and seamless user experiences.
bullets: POS Commerce and store network platforms

expertise.title: Gov Digitisation
expertise.desc: Digitising complex manual workflows for public sectors using scalable open-source platforms.

expertise.title: Healthcare & HealthTech
expertise.desc: Delivering compliant, secure public health platforms and predictive therapy applications.

expertise.title: Digital Transformation
expertise.desc: Delivering custom mobile and web solutions to modernize traditional operations and boost user engagement.

paragraphs: Senior Business Analyst and Product Lead with over a decade of experience delivering high-impact solutions across Supply Chain Management (SCM), E-Commerce, and Government Services. I specialize in modernising legacy inventory planning, order management, and logistics systems using intelligent, data-driven features and automation.

Adept at bridging the gap between complex operations and technology, I guide cross-functional teams through the entire SDLC. My SCM expertise focuses on optimizing supply chain flows, creating real-time inventory visibility, and integrating custom operational software (OMS/WMS) with enterprise ERP frameworks.

pillars.title: Global SCM Architecture
pillars.desc: Modernising inventory visibility, unified commerce, and POS/3PL logistics integrations at scale (e.g., Pandora IIS initiatives).

pillars.title: OMS & ERP Integration
pillars.desc: Designing order management and warehouse operations systems from intake to financial reconciliation (e.g., Cellmark Recycling & IFS ERP).

steps.summary: Coordinated project administration and data tracking for major telecom and digital banking portals.
bullets: Managed campaigns for Reliance Communications (Play Along KBC) and NPCI (USSD banking).
Maintained MIS reports and revenue tracking charts.
Supported GUI migrations and telecom channel operations.

steps.summary: Facilitated stakeholder alignment and business process mapping for enterprise software applications.
bullets: Created detailed process flow diagrams and wireframes (MS-Visio, Balsamiq, Figma).
Drafted pre-sales technical proposals and functional requirements.
Supported internal dev teams as the primary conduit for client feedback.

steps.summary: Magento Team E-Commerce specialist, managing sprint planning, backlog grooming, and customer validation.
bullets: Managed project backlogs and sprint iterations via JIRA and Azure DevOps.
Authored comprehensive BRD, FRD, and SRS documents for e-commerce platforms.
Guided UAT activities and integrated large marketplaces (Amazon & Walmart).

steps.summary: Led complex OMS/ERP modernization and SCM transformations, managing cross-functional Agile teams.
bullets: SCM domain lead for Cellmark OMS and Pandora global inventory team.
Implemented UiPath RPA test workflows, achieving a 30% effort reduction.
Built interactive project dashboards in Power BI and wireframed UX designs in Figma.

tarentoContributions.title: Agile Leadership
tarentoContributions.desc: Certified Scrum Master managing Scrum Ceremonies, sprint planning, and backlog optimisation. Actively mitigated scope creep and contributed to UAT activities.

tarentoContributions.title: Process Automation
tarentoContributions.desc: Implemented UiPath RPA solutions to streamline UAT, reducing manual testing efforts by approximately 30%.

tarentoContributions.title: Data Visualisation
tarentoContributions.desc: Developed interactive Power BI dashboards for real-time project monitoring, enabling data-driven decision-making and enhanced project transparency.

tarentoContributions.title: Design Thinking
tarentoContributions.desc: Utilised FIGMA and Adobe XD to create user-friendly product interfaces, crafting detailed SRS, BRD, and PRD documentation.

tarentoContributions.title: Product Strategy & Roadmap
tarentoContributions.desc: Defined high-level product visions and mapped multi-quarter release plans, aligning technical roadmaps directly with core business milestones.

tarentoContributions.title: Stakeholder & Backlog Management
tarentoContributions.desc: Prioritized backlog items using value-vs-effort scaling, successfully translating complex customer requests into detailed, developer-ready user stories.

ecommerce.title: Lulu Hyper-local eCommerce
ecommerce.desc: Flutter mobile app for Lulu Group's hypermarket, featuring promotions, gift card integration, and additional e-commerce functionality for the Gulf region.

ecommerce.title: HNI: HON Basyx Furniture
ecommerce.desc: B2B e-commerce marketplace on Magento-2 Commerce Cloud. Responsible for requirements analysis, stakeholder liaison, Scrum ceremonies, and regression testing.

ecommerce.title: Zeo Market – eCommerce
ecommerce.desc: India's online retail platform offering diverse products. Integrated Zeo Market Store with giant marketplaces Amazon and Walmart.

enterprise.title: Sludge Management – Odisha Govt
enterprise.desc: Digitised the complete manual sludge management process for the Government of Odisha on the DIGIT Platform, covering sludge collection and treatment workflows.

enterprise.title: Arcade Therapeutics – StarStarter
enterprise.desc: Spearheaded development of a cross-platform mental health solution. Integrated predictive ML models with clinical screening tools (PHQ-2/GAD-2). Managed HIPAA compliance backlog.

enterprise.title: Core Dining & Unidors App
enterprise.desc: Core Dining: Role-based restaurant management app. Unidors: eCommerce mobile app for the Finnish Swimming Federation's product range.

items.name: Product Lifecycle Management (PLM)
items.desc: Steering products from conception to sunset, aligning stakeholders, and optimizing launch strategy.

items.name: Agile & Scrum Leadership
items.desc: Managing sprint cycles, running Scrum ceremonies (daily standups, reviews, retros), and optimizing product backlogs using Scrum & Kanban frameworks.

items.name: Strategic Roadmapping & UX Strategy
items.desc: Mapping high-level visions to multi-quarter releases, prioritizing UX enhancements to maximize user adoption and business value.

items.name: Stakeholder Management
items.desc: Bridging the gap between corporate sponsors, end-users, and software engineering teams to resolve complex product priorities.

items.name: Requirement Elicitation & Analysis
items.desc: Conducting workshops, interviews, and audits to extract precise business needs and define technical scopes.

items.name: Use Case Development
items.desc: Crafting clear and detailed functional scenarios, user stories, and acceptance criteria to direct developer execution.

items.name: Solution Assessment & Validation
items.desc: Evaluating developed software systems against core business objectives and running UAT sessions to guarantee quality.

items.name: Detailed Documentation
items.desc: Authoring comprehensive project artifacts including Business (BRD), Product (PRD), Functional (FRD), and Software Requirements Specifications (SRS).

tools.name: Power BI
